hake-recipe-in-traditional-casserole-com.name: Hake Recipe In Traditional Casserole
hake-recipe-in-traditional-casserole-com.original_name: Receta de merluza a la cazuela tradicional

ingredients.item: 6  medallones de merluza (de entre 150 y 200 gramos cada uno)
100 gr de guisantes (cocidos o en conserva)
3/4 litro de fumet o caldo de pescado

instructions: We'll start with the principle that the pieces of hake are already clear.
With this point already covered, we'll have care of garlic. We'll skin our teeth and mince them into very thin sheets.
Haremos lo mismo con la cebolla: la pelaremos y la picaremos en cubitos.
Then we will cover a plate with a cape of flour, and we will later use them to bounce the hake.
To continue, we will warm an oil jet into a large anti-stick frying pan or pan, with medium-low heat.
When the oil's hot, we'll fry the garlic and onion we had minced earlier. We'll cook it for about five minutes, stirring often. The goal is to get them golden but without burning.
Then we recouped the garlic and onion with a scatula scatula. We will reserve them momentarily and increase the intensity of fire by half.

We will pat every piece of hake and pass it through the flour, covering both sides. Then we'll put the fish into the oil and cook them. First we'll do one side and then the other, with a maximum of ten minutes of cooking.
We'll get our scattering peas and clams and shrimp. We'll have a drink with the fish stock.
Let them cook for another five minutes. At that time they should open their clams.
After this time, try the broth to check the date. If necessary, fix with more salt and pepper and carefully mix the salsa so as to avoid damage to the hake and seafood.
Luego, cubre las piezas de merluza con el ajo y la cebolla cocidos previamente.
That's it. The pits are ready to serve. Ideally, they serve each piece on an individual mud plate or pan with some stock, some peas and some clams and shrimp.

hake-with-ham-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Hake With Ham In The Oven
instructions: Season the hake posts with salt and pepper and wrap 2 slices of ham around each. Reserve.
Cut the courgette into slices and peel the potatoes. Have the curgette slices on the bottom of an oven tray. Lay out the hake posts on the courgette and the potatoes around it.
Season the potatoes with salt and water everything with olive oil. Bring it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 40 minutes, or until the fish is cooked and the crispy ham.

halibut-with-spring-onion-and-summer-squ.name: Halibut With Spring Onion And Summer Squash Sauté

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Cut onion bulbs in half lengthwise (quarter if large). Cut enough onion tops into 2" lengths to measure 1 cup. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until almost smoking. Add onion bulbs, cut side down; cook until golden, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in same skillet. Add squash; cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and just tender, about 5 minutes. Stir in onion bulbs, 1 cup onion tops, and 1 Tbsp. thyme leaves; season with salt and pepper and cook until onion tops wilt, about 1 minute longer. Remove from heat; set squash mixture aside.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick or cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Season halibut with salt. Add fish and thyme sprigs to skillet and cook until fish is golden brown, about 5 minutes. Turn fish and cook until just cooked through and opaque in the center, about 2 minutes longer. Divide onion-squash sauté among plates; top with halibut.

ham-bone-and-green-split-pea-soup.name: Ham Bone And Green Split Pea Soup
instructions: Melt butter and oil in a stockpot or Dutch oven over medium-low heat. Add celery, carrot, onion, and salt; cook and stir until tender, about 5 minutes. Stir in peas and garlic.
Nestle ham bone into the pot; add stock and diced ham. Add enough water so that liquid is about 1 1/2 inches from the top of the pot; bring to a boil.

Reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer, stirring every 30 minutes and scraping the bottom of the pot, until peas are mostly disintegrated, about 2 1/2 hours. Turn ham bone and skim the surface for fat once every hour.

Remove ham bone from the pot and place on a cutting board until cool enough to handle. Remove any meat from the bones and cut into bite-sized pieces; stir into soup until warmed through and season with salt and pepper.

hasselback-potatoes.name: Hasselback Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Peel potatoes, then use peeler to shave off some flesh as needed to give potatoes a smooth, rounded egg shape. Cut potatoes crosswise into thin slices, stopping ¼” before cutting all the way through.
Place potatoes on a rimmed baking sheet and gently press down on them to fan slices in one direction.

Brush potatoes all over with ½ cup butter. Tuck 2 sage leaves into each potato; season with salt. Roast potatoes, brushing occasionally with more butter, until fork-tender, golden brown, and crisp, 25–30 minutes.

healthier-amish-friendship-bread-starter.name: Healthier Amish Friendship Bread Starter
instructions: Dissolve yeast in water in a small bowl. Let stand 10 minutes. Combine 1 cup all-purpose flour and 1 cup sugar in a 2-quart container. Mix thoroughly or flour will lump when milk is added. Slowly stir in 1 cup milk and dissolved yeast mixture. Cover loosely and let stand until bubbly. Consider this day 1 of the 10 day cycle. Leave loosely covered at room temperature.
On days 2 through 4: Stir starter with a spoon. Day 5: Stir in 1 cup white whole wheat flour, 1 cup sugar and 1 cup milk. Days 6 through 9: Stir only.

Day 10: Stir in 1/2 cup each all-purpose and white whole wheat flour, 1 cup sugar, and 1 cup milk. Remove 1 cup to make your first bread, give 2 cups to friends along with this recipe, and your favorite Amish Bread recipe. Store the remaining 1 cup starter in a container in the refrigerator, or begin the 10 day process over again (beginning with step 2).

herb-and-garlic-roast-tenderloin-with-cr.name: Herb And Garlic Roast Tenderloin With Creamy Horseradish Sauce

ingredients.item: Carapelli premium 100% italian extra virgin olive oil
Coarse sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine 2 tablespoons olive oil, garlic, thyme, rosemary, 1 teaspoon salt, and black pepper in a small bowl; set aside.

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat. Add tenderloin; cook until well-browned, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip tenderloin; turn off heat. Spread garlic-herb oil evenly over top and sides of tenderloin.

Cook in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads 52°C (50 degrees C), 25 to 30 minutes. Transfer tenderloin to a carving board; tent with foil and let stand 10 minutes. (Internal temperature will rise to 54°C (54 degrees C) for medium-rare.)
Meanwhile, combine sour cream, horseradish, remaining 1 tablespoon oil, and remaining ½ teaspoon salt in a small bowl; chill until ready to serve.
Carve tenderloin crosswise into ½-inch thick slices; serve with horseradish sauce.

holiday-bourbon-fruitcake.name: Holiday Bourbon Fruitcake
instructions: On the first day, combine candied orange peel, candied citron, candied pineapple, red and green candied cherries, currants, raisins, walnuts, and almonds. Combine orange juice and 2/3 cup bourbon; pour over fruit and nuts. Stir and then cover tightly. Let fruit marinate in a cool place for a full day, or at least 20 hours.

On the second day, line two 9x5-inch loaf pans with parchment paper or aluminum foil and grease the inside with cooking spray. Combine flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, allspice, ginger, cocoa, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl and stir with a whisk to blend.

In a separate large bowl, beat butter, brown sugar, and white sugar until light and fluffy using an electric mixer. Stir in egg yolks until blended and then mix in applesauce, 1/2 cup bourbon, and vanilla until fluffy. Continue stirring, and add flour mixture gradually until well combined. Add molasses and stir to combine. When batter is thoroughly mixed, gently mix in fruit and nut mixture with all of its juices.

In a separate bowl, whip egg whites with an electric mixer until they can hold a stiff peak. Fold egg whites into batter. Divide evenly between the prepared pans. Cover loosely with a towel and let batter stand 8 hours to overnight in a cool, dry place.

On the third day, preheat the oven to 121°C (120 degrees C). Place a large baking pan on the bottom shelf and pour boiling water into it until almost full. Place a baking sheet on the center shelf and place fruit cakes on the baking sheet.

Bake for 2 1/2 hours in the preheated oven. Check water level and refill if needed. Cover cakes with a sheet of parchment paper, taking care not to let it touch the shelf. Continue to bake until a knife or toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour more. Cool fruitcakes in the pans, and set over a wire rack. Once cool, remove cakes from the pans, and leave the parchment paper on. Sprinkle with more bourbon if desired and wrap in aluminum foil. Place in a tin or other sealed container and let sit 8 hours to overnight before serving.

holiday-cranberry-sauce.name: Holiday Cranberry Sauce
instructions: Wrap cinnamon sticks, cloves, and allspice berries in a spice bag.
Combine cranberries, water, and spice bag in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Cook until cranberries begin to burst, about 10 minutes.
Stir in sugar and reduce the heat to low. Continue cooking until sugar dissolves, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat and let cool to room temperature, about 30 minutes.
Remove and discard spice bag. Cover cranberry sauce and chill in the refrigerator before serving, 8 hours to overnight.

holiday-sweet-potato-casserole.name: Holiday Sweet Potato Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Line a 2-quart rectangular baking dish with Reynolds Wrap® Pan Lining Paper, parchment side up. No need to grease dish.

Add parsnips and/or carrots to a large microwave-safe bowl. Add 1/4 cup water and cover with wax paper. Microwave on high for 5 minutes. Uncover and add sweet potatoes. Cover and microwave 15 minutes more or until tender, stirring once. Drain and return vegetables to bowl.
Pour broth and cream into the bowl with vegetables. Use a potato masher to mash to desired consistency. Stir in 3 tablespoons butter and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Transfer to prepared baking dish.

Combine brown sugar, flour, rosemary, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a medium bowl. Using a pastry blender, two forks, or your fingers, cut in 2 tablespoons butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in pecans and maple syrup and sprinkle over sweet potato-mixture.
Bake 20 to 25 minutes or until pecan mixture is just starting to brown.

holland-red-light.name: Holland Red Light
instructions: Shake Genever, syrup, lime juice, and molasses in cocktail shaker (no ice). Pour into 2 glasses filled with crushed ice. Pack extra ice over, forming dome. Top with bitters and lime wedge.

honey-mustard-pretzel-roast-chicken.name: Honey Mustard Pretzel Roast Chicken

ingredients.item: Plus  0.5 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 tsp. morton kosher salt

Plus 1 tbsp. chinese hot mustard powder (preferably
s&b)

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°. Sprinkle one 3½–4-lb. whole chicken, patted dry, all over with 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil and rub in to coat.

Place 1 lb. small potatoes, halved, quartered if larger, and 4 large shallots, peeled, quartered through root ends, in a 12"-diameter cast-iron skillet. Drizzle with oil, season generously with salt, and sprinkle with 1 tsp. Chinese hot mustard powder and ½ tsp. onion powder. Toss to coat and arrange in a single layer. Place chicken, breast side up, on top. Roast until chicken is very light golden, about 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, stir ¼ cup Dijon mustard, 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. honey, 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, remaining 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. Chinese hot mustard powder, remaining 2 tsp. onion powder, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl to combine.

Brush chicken, potatoes, and shallots all over with some
mustard mixture. Return to oven and roast, covering breast with foil if skin starts to
get too dark, until potatoes are tender, shallots are jammy, and an instant-read
thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breast registers 155° (temperature will
climb to 160° as it rests), 20–30 minutes. Let chicken rest in skillet 10 minutes. Carve
as desired.

Cook remaining mustard mixture in a small saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring often, until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in remaining 1 Tbsp. honey. Transfer sauce to a small bowl; rinse out pan. Combine pretzels and remaining 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, in same pan and cook over medium-high, tossing, until coated, about 2 minutes.

Divide chicken, potatoes, and shallots among plates; scatter ⅓ cup coarsely crushed thick pretzel rods over. Top with lots of dill sprigs and season with freshly ground pepper. Drizzle sauce over or serve on the side for dipping.

honey-caramel-ice-cream-sundaes-with-app.name: Honey-caramel Ice Cream Sundaes With Apples

ingredients.prep: peeled, cored, each cut into 8 wedges

instructions: Stir sugar, cream, butter, honey, and 3 tablespoons water in heavy medium saucepan over low heat until sugar dissolves. Increase heat; bring syrup to boil. Add spices, pinch of salt, and pinch of black pepper, shaking pan to blend. Boil without stirring until sauce coats spoon, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cool, cover, and chill. Rewarm before using.
Melt butter in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add apples; sprinkle with sugar. Sauté apples until tender and brown in spots, about 12 minutes.
Scoop ice cream into dishes. Top with sauce, apples, and pecans, if using.

honeynut-squash-with-radicchio-and-miso.name: Honeynut Squash With Radicchio And Miso

ingredients.prep: halved, seeds removed, or 1 acorn squash, seeds removed, cut into thick wedges
outer leaves removed and halved, cores quartered

ingredients.item: Granny smith or other tart apple

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Cook farro in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, 25–35 minutes. Drain; spread out on a rimmed baking sheet.
Meanwhile, toss squash with 1 Tbsp. oil on another rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Turn squash cut side down and roast until browned and tender, 20–30 minutes.

Bring pine nuts and remaining 4 Tbsp. oil to a very gentle simmer in a small saucepan over medium, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat and cook at a very low simmer until nuts are light golden brown, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in garlic and miso. Let cool (it will look a bit chunky and broken at this point). Add vinegar and 1 Tbsp. chives and whisk until dressing is smooth and emulsified; season with salt.
Toss farro and a generous tablespoonful of dressing in a large bowl; season with salt.
Toss radicchio and apple and 2 Tbsp. dressing in a medium bowl and toss to combine. Season salad with salt.
Arrange farro on a platter; top with squash and salad. Drizzle remaining dressing over and top with more chives.

hot-and-cold-teleculinaria.name: Hot And Cold
instructions: Crush the cookies until they're powdered and save. Tap, for 5 minutes, half the cream with half the condensed milk and the white milk. Add the powdered cookie and wrap.
On the other hand, beat the remaining creams into whipped cream and then mix into the previous cream.
Line up an English cake form with adhering film and throw in the previous preparation. Take it to the freezer until it solidifies completely.

At the time of serving, melt the chocolate in a sea bath, broken into pieces, with the remaining condensed milk. Unform the ice cream, reject the film and pour the melted chocolate on top. Serve immediately, decorating with more crushed cookie.

hot-pepper-sauce-lezzet.name: Hot Pepper Sauce
instructions: 1. Wash the peppers and cut the stems.
2. Seeds of red peppers crack.
3. Iri polish cut in the form.
4. Take the peppers you cleaned in the pot, add 1 water glass and close the cover of the pot.
5. Bake until softening.
6. Soft peppers make pure with water.
7. Crossremove a rough glass from the strainer.
8. Make sure more shells and seeds are separated at this stage.
9. Püin the interior of peppers that have become; add salt, sugar and vinegar and mix well.
10. Posted in Karli Sauce jar or small bottles and store in the refrigerator.

how-to-make-a-bloody-mary-traditional-co.name: How To Make A Bloody Mary (traditional Cocktail Recipe)
how-to-make-a-bloody-mary-traditional-co.original_name: Cómo hacer un Bloody Mary (receta de cóctel tradicional)

ingredients.item: 6 measures tomato juice (you can buy here)
3 measures of vodka (you can buy here)
3 drops of perrins sauce (you can buy here)
2 drops of tabasco sauce (you can buy here)
A pinch of freshly ground black pepper

instructions: We advise you to wear a pitcher like this. If you like to make cocktails at home, it's worth the investment. If you don't have it, you can improvise one with a bottle with a cover. That's right. We put tomato juice, vodka, sauces, a chorrit of lemon juice, salt and pepper and two and three cubes of ice at the cocktail. We mix well and turn the pitcher up and down, without stirring. We want to mix and cool, not beat. We serve in two high cups. The classic thing is to decorate with a paddle of celery. We have added a carrot strip, a slice of lemon and some polished olives into a brush.

how-to-make-a-delicious-lemon-mousse-com.name: How To Make A Delicious Lemon Mousse
how-to-make-a-delicious-lemon-mousse-com.original_name: Cómo hacer un delicioso mousse de limón
instructions: In a small pot with medium heat mix sugar, corn and salt.
Agrega las yemas de huevo y la leche y mezcla hasta que se incorporen los ingredientes.
Fold citrus and mix. Let them boil with medium heat and stir constantly. Cooking and stirring for another 2 minutes. Add the pits.
Kill the fire and remove the pot from the stove. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and cover the surface with plastic. Reach into the refrigerator and completely cool. About ten minutes.
In a clear bowl, serve the cream and bat till soft peaks form. It incorporates into the citrus mix.
Serves in individual containers and decorates with lemon or lime slices.

how-to-make-a-italian-dressing-comedera.name: How To Make A Italian Dressing
how-to-make-a-italian-dressing-comedera.original_name: Cómo hacer un aderezo clásico italiano

ingredients.item: 2 cds of white wine vinegar (or balsamic)

instructions: Put olive oil in a mixer.
It incorporates vinegar from white or balsamic wine. Then put the oregano dry and the basic dry.
Mix very well till the herbs are broken and release all their flavour and smell to impregnate olive oil.
It later incorporates powerful garlic, Sugar, salt and pepper to aste and mustard.
Finish mixing till all are fully integrated.
It puts the dressing mixture into a glass pack with a cover or an airtight one.
Take your refrigerator for about 15 minutes till the flavors are seated and ready.
Adjust your favorite trust and enjoy!

how-to-make-baked-bacon-cheesy-mashed-po.name: How To Make Baked Bacon Cheesy Mashed Potatoes
how-to-make-baked-bacon-cheesy-mashed-po.original_name: Cómo hacer puré de papas con queso y tocino al horno

ingredients.item: 1 kg de papas amarillas (peladas y cortadas en cubos)
6  rebanadas de tocino fritas y desmenuzadas
Cilantro o perejil  (picado finamente al gusto)

instructions: Put the potatoes in a pot with enough water. Wound for 20 minutes or till they're soft.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Once ready, remove from fire and place into a bowl. With the help of a shredder, do purée till they are soft.
Then add salt and pepper to your taste. Butter and sour cream. Meg till it's pitted.
En una refractaria o base para el horno, distribuye la mitad de la mezcla de las papas de manera uniforme.
Esparce el queso cheddar rallado.
Now, cover with the remaining mixture of potatoes and form a final cape.
30 to 35 minutes and will grow a little and be slightly dyed at the top.
Retira del horno y esparce el tocino frito. Corta en pedazos y sirve.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-cheddar-and-bacon-french-fri.name: How To Make Cheddar And Bacon French Fries
how-to-make-cheddar-and-bacon-french-fri.original_name: Cómo hacer papas fritas con queso cheddar y tocineta

ingredients.item: 5 onzas de tocino picado en tiras
1  cda. de perejil  (para decorar, finamente picado)

instructions: Cut the bacon into cubes, the size you like. Put it in a hot frying pan. The same fat will cook.
Dore the bacon into a frying pan, and as soon as it's ready, remove and let the oil slip into an absorbing paper.
En una olla a fuego medio, agrega la taza de media crema, el queso cheddar, sal y pimienta al gusto.
Revuelve y deja cocinar durante 8 minutos. Luego tapa y deja reposar.
Corta las papas en bastones y reserva.
In a frying pan with enough hot oil with medium high heat, add the potatoes and let cook for 5-7 minutes or till the potatoes are golden.
Then remove them from frying pan and place them on absorbing paper while you finish with other potatoes.
Al terminar, sazona con sal al gusto.
To serve, she forms a bed of potatoes, and she baits with cheddar sauce and incorporates fried bacon.
Decora con perejil y disfruta.

how-to-make-chicken-fesenjan-comedera.name: How To Make Chicken Fesenjan
instructions: Tritura las nueces hasta que tengas una pasta fina, no puede quedar granulada.
Warm a pot or pan with olive oil and spray onion till clear.
Add the nuts and the turmeric. Mix and cook with low heat for 7 minutes. You have to remove them so they don't stick.
Incorpora las piezas de pollo y sazona con sal y pimienta. Cocina hasta que dore el pollo.
Vierte las tazas del caldo de pollo y cocina a fuego medio por una hora hasta que el pollo quede tierno.
Add pomegranate and rectify salt and pepper. Meg and cook for 30 more minutes till the salsa is thick and dark.
Turn off and you'll be ready to serve. It goes with white and decorates with fresh pomegranate.

how-to-make-english-breakfast-at-home-co.name: How To Make English Breakfast At Home
how-to-make-english-breakfast-at-home-co.original_name: Cómo hacer desayuno inglés en casa

ingredients.item: 1 lata de alubias o baked beans

instructions: Let's start our recipe, warming up a frying pan with butter. Once she's melted, you'll start pounding the sausages for about 10 minutes and cook them and have them dyed. Reserve.
Now, you'll do the same with the tocinets. You have to cook them till they're crispy. Once ready, you'll book.
That same frying pan, you're gonna fry your balls. The cooking will depend how you like the texture. I like them a little moist. Remember to add salt to your taste.
For mushrooms, you have to clear them and cut them to pieces. Warm up a frying pan with some oil and you'll leap for 5 minutes.
The tomato, you'll cut them up and you'll jump as well. Add some salt to give them a taste.
Take the beans in a can and you'll warm them up with a microwave or a frying pan to get them at temperature.
To place, you will add all the ingredients and with mold bread toast to a large and flat plate.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-fried-ladoo-at-home-comedera.name: How To Make Fried Ladoo At Home
how-to-make-fried-ladoo-at-home-comedera.original_name: Cómo hacer ladoo frito en casa

ingredients.item: 120 gr de harina de garbanzo fina (besan)
1 cda de harina de arroz (para mayor crocancia)
1 cda de coco rallado muy fino
1 a 2 cdas de leche (solo si la masa lo requiere)

instructions: Prepare the syrup. In a small saucepan, mix sugar, water, cardamom and saffron. Cooking with medium heat to get a slightly thick syrup (light strand, about 8 minutes). Add lemon juice to avoid crystallization and, out of the fire, add pink water. Reserve tibia.
Mix the dry ingredients. In a large bowl, combine cheesebirk flour, meal, rice flour, baking powder, salt, cardamom and frosted coconut.

Incorporate the yogurt. Add the yogurt little by little and mix to get a thick and molded mass. If it's too dry, add milk in small amounts. The ideal texture is soft but firm, enabling them to form balls without frying.
Repose the dough. To cover and let rest 10 to 15 minutes so that the meal absorbs moisture and the mixture will be properly hydrated.
To form the ladoos. With his hands slightly moist, form small spheres the size of a nut.

Filling at controlled temperature. Warm up the oil at 160-165-3. Filling the laddoos with medium-low heat to cook them inside without burning them out. Fold them constantly until they are uniformly golden (4 to 5 minutes per batch).
Drain and bath in syrup. Remove and place onto absorbent paper for 30 seconds. Then dive immediately into the tibia syrup for 3 to 5 minutes.
Decorar y reposar. Espolvorear pistachos o almendras y dejar reposar 10 minutos antes de servir.

how-to-make-italian-style-turkey-stuffin.name: How To Make Italian-style Turkey Stuffing
how-to-make-italian-style-turkey-stuffin.original_name: Cómo hacer un relleno para pavo al estilo italiano

ingredients.item: 500 gr de salchicha italiana ((de preferencia la variedad con hierbas y especias))
2 cdas de aceite de oliva (extra virgen)
2 cdas de hojas de perejil fresco

instructions: Remove the skin from the Italian sausage and scrape it into medium pieces.

In a large frying pan, heat up a tablespoon of olive oil and add the crumbling sausage. Cooking at medium heat till it's golden and crispy. Remove the sausage from the frying pan and put it into a plate with absorbing paper to remove excess fat.

In the same frying pan, add another tablespoon of olive oil and splits onion, garlic, celery, carrot and mushrooms over medium heat. Cooking till the vegetables are soft and slightly golden about 10 minutes.
Add cube bread, parsley, rosemary and thyme to frying pan with vegetables. Revolves well to impregnate flavors.

Fold the chicken stock and white wine into the mixture, gently stirring till the bread absorbs the liquid. Add the golden sausage back to frying pan and with salt and pepper to suit. If you wish a more intense taste, add parmesan grated cheese.
You can use this mixture as a pilling for turkey or bake it apart with an oven plate at 180 ″ 3 ″ for 20-25 minutes till the bread is crispy at the surface.

how-to-make-pappardelle-with-spinach-pes.name: How To Make Pappardelle With Spinach Pesto
how-to-make-pappardelle-with-spinach-pes.original_name: Cómo hacer pappardelle con pesto de espinacas

ingredients.item: 200 gr de pappardelle fresco ((puede ser seco si no se consigue fresco))
100 gr de espinaca fresca lavada y escurrida
30 g of nuts or roasted almonds ((also pistachio for more intense flavour))
40 g parmesan grated cheese ((or pecorate for a more salted profile))
50 ml de aceite de oliva ( extra virgen)

instructions: Boil abundant water with salt and cook papardelle to dente as instructed by the package.
While the dough is cooked, prepare the pesto: place spinach, nuts, garlic, cheese, lemon juice and some salt into a food processor. Jumping.
Add olive oil to achieve a homogenous cream. Adjust the texture with water from the pasta cooking.
Drain dappardelle, reserve a cup of cooking water and put the dough back to the pot.
Incorporar el pesto, mezclando con cuidado para que se impregne bien en cada cinta de pasta.
Serve hot, sprinkle more cheese and a touch of black pepper.

how-to-make-seafood-risotto-comedera.name: How To Make Seafood Risotto

ingredients.item: 1 litro aproximadamente de caldo de gambas

instructions: Waves and pits the prawns and pits with their heads and shells, and here I explain how. Clean up your squid and get them in medium rings. Reserve by the shrimp.

In a deep pot, fry the onion into the butter until it starts to light up. Add the squids and get cold for a few minutes. After this time they should have been put on targets, at this moment add a jet of white wine and stir well to evaporate the alcohol quickly. Put a pint of salt and pepper.

Incorporates the rice, stirres to get well impregnated from the fluids. He starts throwing water out of his prawn's broth that you did earlier. First two cups. From this moment on you're going to scramble with a paddle constantly, without stopping. The idea is that the liquid will never dry, you have to be adding a cup at once to the rice as the liquid evaporate greatly and always, always stirring. The preparations will be creamy as minutes pass. It fixes salt and pepper and keeps integrating fluids. Check out the photo later. That's how the pot should always be at all times.

After about 15 minutes check the grain of the rice, it should be about, if not ready, depending on your kitchen and pot. At this point you will add the shrimp, as well as a little more broth. Keep stirring and, if necessary, lower the plate temperature.
In less than 5 minutes your risotto should be ready. He's got to be creamy as his photo.
Put his parsley, stir once more and withdraw from his plate. Serve them immediately and enjoy this delicious seafood risotto recipe.

how-to-make-slit-flautas-with-cheese-com.name: How To Make Slit Flautas With Cheese
how-to-make-slit-flautas-with-cheese-com.original_name: Cómo hacer flautas de raja con queso
instructions: Roast the village chiles onto a hot plate or frying pan and get a little burned.
Turn and withdraw. Put the chilies inside a bag and let them stand for 15 minutes to sweat.
Pasado ese tiempo, retira toda la piel de los chiles con cuidado y corta en tiras. Reserva.

2-hour-strawberry-cheesecake.name: 2-hour Strawberry Cheesecake
instructions: Make the crust: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C).
Add the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter to a medium bowl and mix well.
Transfer the crumbs to a 9-inch pie dish and press evenly against the bottom and up the sides.
Bake the crust for 5–10 minutes, until firm.
Remove the crust from the oven and let cool. Reduce the oven temperature to 149°C (150°C).

Make the filling: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, combine the cream cheese and beat until smooth. Add the sour cream and beat on medium speed until well incorporated, scraping down the sides of the bowl as neede. Add the sugar and beat to combine. Add the eggs, 1 at a time, beating until well combined before adding the next addition. Add the vanilla and beat to incorporate.
Pour the cream cheese filling into the prepared crust.
Bake for 45–60 minutes, until mostly set but still slightly jiggly at the center. The cheesecake will continue to set as it cools.
Remove the cheesecake from the oven and chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour, or until set.
Make the strawberry topping: Add the strawberries, sugar, and corn syrup to a medium skillet over medium-high heat. Cook until syrupy, but the strawberry halves are mostly intact, about 5 minutes.

In a small bowl, whisk together the water and cornstarch. Add to the strawberry mixture and cook until thick and glossy, 2–3 minutes.  Transfer the topping to a heatproof bowl and refrigerate until cool.
When ready to serve, pour the topping over the cheesecake and spread evenly. Slice and serve.
Enjoy!
